caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, large over-ear headphones, and a black hoodie with the gold and white text "BOSS TALK" is seated in a recording studio. He is positioned behind a professional microphone on a boom arm. In the background, a white wall features repeated logos consisting of gold stars and the word "HUSTLE," and a blue sign above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the desk in front of him sits a black mug with red and white text that reads "BOSS TALK OUT LOUD". To the left, a black equipment case is visible. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, facing slightly to the left and speaking. His facial expression and posture remain relatively consistent across the frames, with slight shifts in his mouth and head position as he talks.
